questions.question: What does "Если бы я знал ответ, я бы тебе сказал" mean in English?
options: If I know the answer, I will tell you
If I knew the answer, I would tell you
If I knew the answer, I tell you
If I will know, I would tell
questions.correct_answer: If I knew the answer, I would tell you
questions.audio: Если бы я знал ответ, я бы тебе сказал

questions.question: What does "Статья написана известным автором" mean in English?
options: The article is written by a famous author
The article was wrote by the author
questions.correct_answer: The article is written by a famous author

questions.question: What does "Меня интересуют русские традиции" mean in English?
options: I am interested in Russian traditions
I like Russian traditions very much
questions.correct_answer: I am interested in Russian traditions

questions.question: What does "Хотя он не говорил по-русски, он понимал всё" mean in English?
options: Although he did not speak Russian, he understood everything
He didn't speak Russian so he understood
Although understanding Russian, he didn't speak
questions.correct_answer: Although he did not speak Russian, he understood everything
questions.audio: Хотя он не говорил по-русски, он понимал всё

questions.question: What does "Эта книга интереснее, чем та" mean in English?
options: This book is more interesting than that one
This book is more interesting as that
This book is interesting and that book too
This book and that book are interesting
questions.correct_answer: This book is more interesting than that one

questions.question: What does "В течение года он закончил четыре курса" mean in English?
options: For a year he will complete four courses
During the year he completed four courses
In year he is completing courses
For year he was complete four courses
questions.correct_answer: During the year he completed four courses
questions.audio: В течение года он закончил четыре курса

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Он говорил о своём ___ в жизни.
questions.correct_answer: опыте

questions.correct_answer: является

questions.correct_answer: решил

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Это событие ___ значительное влияние на общество.
questions.correct_answer: имело

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Учитель объяснил нам правило ___ понятно.
questions.correct_answer: вполне

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Книга была ___ с большим интересом.
questions.correct_answer: читана

He recognized this as a work

Если бы он знал, он бы не пришёл

Если он будет знать, он не придёт

options: Он говорил, как будто он всё знал
Он говорит, как будто знает всё
Он говорит так, что знает всё
Он говорил как ему всё знать
